production.playableLoop: Drive a copper mine cart around the rail yard, collect five ore chunks, dodge moving steam vents, and dump the load into the furnace before the shift timer expires.
production.objective: Deposit Ore 5/5 into the orange furnace before Shift reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Touching a steam vent or timing out enters failed state; Space resets the shift.

catalogSearches: tn asset source search --game-category industrial --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category mining --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category factory --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category trains --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --query cart --format glb --direct-only --json -> selected CC0 OS3A Polygonal Mind cart record os3a-pm-medieval-fair-medieval-fair-011-cart

selected.inspection: tn asset inspect assets/models/cart.glb --json passed; embedded textures, 935564 bytes, gameplay verdict ok

assetProvenance.fallback: Factory, mining, industrial, and train catalog searches did not provide a cohesive direct kit. Rails, furnace, ore, steam vents, yard dressing, UI, and feedback surfaces are authored as a compact low-poly primitive kit around the selected CC0 cart model.
